semantic.role: Infrastructure utility class providing atomic file write and safe file copy operations for the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Implements atomic file writes using a temporary file and rename pattern to prevent corruption.
Ensures target directory exists before writing, creating it recursively if necessary.
Provides a safe file copy operation that handles existing destination files and logs warnings on failure.
outOfScope: File watching or event-driven filesystem changes
Complex file parsing or content transformation
invariants: All file system operations are performed synchronously.
Atomic writes are guaranteed via temporary file creation and atomic rename.
Directory existence is checked and created if missing before write operations.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reliable, corruption-resistant foundation for all file I/O within the ArchSpine system.
